chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Appln. No.S-562 of 2025. DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE. 1. For orders on M.A. No.3456/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on M.A. No.3457/2025 (Ex/A) 3. For orders on M.A. No.3458/2025 (561-A) 4. For hearing of protective bail. 04.07.2025 Mr. Shabir Ali Bozdar, Advocate alongwith applicant. ******** 1. Urgency Granted. 2. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 3&4. Through instant bail application, applicant Jamaluddin seeks protective bail in Crime No.GO-04/2024 registered at Police Station, ACE Sukkur under Sections 161, 465, 468, 470, 471, 477-A, 420, 34 PPC r/w Sections Section 5 Act-II, of prevention of corruption Act, 1947. It is, inter alia, contended that accused has been identified as alleged absconder in the final report available at page No.17. He further submits that applicant is innocent and has falsely been involved in this case by the police. He contended that as soon as applicant came to know he tried to surrender himself before the concerned Court for pre-arrest bail but applicant has grave apprehension of his malicious arrest before reaching the same at the hands of police hence, he has approached this Court for grant of protective bail. Be that as it may, without touching merits of the case and in order to enable him to appear before concerned Court he is granted protective bail for a period of Ten days commencing from today, subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees Fifty thousand) subject to exception case not to be treated as precedent and PR bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court.

He contended that as soon as applicant came to know he tried to surrender himself before the concerned Court for pre-arrest bail but applicant has grave apprehension of his malicious arrest before reaching the same at the hands of police hence, he has approached this Court for grant of protective bail. Be that as it may, without touching merits of the case and in order to enable him to appear before concerned Court he is granted protective bail for a period of Ten days commencing from today, subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees Fifty thousand) subject to exception case not to be treated as precedent and PR bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. In the meanwhile operation of NBWs, if any, issued against the applicant is suspended for aforesaid period. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of said period or on appearance of applicant before concerned Court, whichever is earlier. In case, applicant fails to surrender before the concerned Court within stipulated period, his bail bond shall stand forfeited. Bail application stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E
